- Yellow strip (Y): (44,58)-(49,59) - 12 pixels
- White area below barrier: (36,60)-(63,63) - 112 pixels
- White area above barrier: (1,24)-(27,63) - 1064 pixels
So the player moved from cols 46-49 to 54-57 (right by 8). The white area below shrank from cols 52-63 to cols 60-63 (also shifted right). The white area above expanded from cols 32-63 to cols 24-63 (expanded left by 8).
The game seems to be about moving the player left/right, which also adjusts the white walkable area. The charcoal bar at the top (row 0) also changes.
Let me think about what the goal might be. The player starts at cols 46-49. The yellow gap in the barrier is at cols 38-39. If I move the player left to align with the gap, maybe that's the goal.
Currently player is at cols 54-57. To get to cols 38-39, I need to move left by 16 cells, which is 4 clicks on the lower blue target.
But wait, let me reconsider. The initial white area below was cols 52-63. The player was at 46-49 with yellow at 50-51. The gap in the barrier is at 38-39. If I move the player left, the white area shrinks. At some point, maybe the white area connects with the gap?
Actually, looking at the layout:
- Black barrier with gap at rows 28-31, cols 38-39
- White area above: rows 1-27, cols 24-63 (currently)
- White area below: rows 36-63, cols 60-63 (currently)
- Player at rows 44-49, cols 54-57
The gap is at cols 38-39, which is to the LEFT of the white area above (cols 24-63). The white area above already extends to col 24, which is left of the gap at 38-39. So the gap is within the white area above's column range.
Wait, the gap is at cols 38-39, and the white area above is cols 24-63. So the gap is within the white area. But the white area below is cols 60-63, which doesn't overlap with the gap.
Maybe the goal is to move the player (and thus the white area below) to align with the gap. If I move the player left enough, the white area below would extend to cols 38-39, connecting with the gap.
Let me calculate: currently white area below is cols 60-63. The gap is at cols 38-39. To align, I need to move left by 20-24 cells, which is 5-6 clicks. But the player would need to be at cols 30-33 or so.
Actually, let me think about this differently. The white area below seems to be 4 columns wide (60-63). The player is 4 columns wide (54-57), and the yellow strip is 2 columns wide (58-59). Together they occupy cols 54-59. The white area is cols 60-63.
When the player moves right, the white area shrinks. When the player moves left, the white area expands. The goal might be to expand the white area below to connect with the gap in the barrier.
Let me try moving the player left multiple times to see if the white area connects with the gap.
